headline: Corteva, Inc. (CTVA) Hit a 52 Week High, Can the Run Continue?
summary: Corteva, Inc. (CTVA) is at a 52-week high, but can investors hope for more gains in the future? We take a look at the company's fundamentals for clues.

headline: FMC Secures EU Nod for Isoflex Active Herbicide Market Expansion
summary: FMC wins EU approval for Isoflex herbicide, unlocking access to more than 55 million hectares in a market lacking new crop protection solutions.
